---
title: "ABFM Levy Elasticity Models"
author: "MVH & AW"
format: 
  html:
    theme: lumen
    code-fold: true
    code-line-numbers: true
    code-overflow: wrap
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    tbl-cap-location: margin
    fig-cap-location: top
    grid:
      sidebar-width: 200px
      body-width: 900px
      margin-width: 200px
---

```{r setup}

#| code-fold: false
#| output: false

knitr::opts_chunk$set(warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)

library(plm)
library(stars)
library(lmtest)
library(huxtable)
library(jtools)
```

```{r}

df <- read.csv("panel_data.csv")

summary(df)

df_panel <- pdata.frame(df, index = c("agency_num", "year")) 
```

# Two-Way Fixed Effects Models

## Naive Model

```{r}


```
